title: Section 33P
content: 1[2[ 3[33P.] Power to give directions.--The Central Government may give such directions to any State Government as may appear to the Central Government to be necessary for carrying into execution in the State any of the provisions of this Act or of any rule or order made thereunder.]]
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 11 of 1955, s. 16, for s. 34. 2 Ins. by Act 35 of 1960, s. 11 (w.e.f. 16-3-1961). 3 S. 33A re-numbered as s. 33P by Act 13 of 1964, s. 27 (w.e.f. 15-9-1964)
